original_filing_date.description: Date the original document (now being corrected) was filed with the Secretary of State.

original_document_type.description: Title/type of the original document being corrected (e.g., 'Certificate of Limited Liability Partnership', 'Certificate of Amendment'). NOTE: on MLLP-17 this concept is visible on the form ('partnership entitled: ___') but the corresponding AcroForm widget is MISSING — template-level upstream bug. The canonical key is reserved for future correction-style forms that DO bind it.

defect_description.description: Free-text description of the inaccuracy or defect in the original filing that necessitates the correction (THIRD recital).

corrected_text.description: Free-text replacement for the defective portion of the original document — what it should read in its entirety after correction (FOURTH recital). Multi-line.

name.description: Name of an entity-partner (corporate/LLC) that is signing the certificate on behalf of itself as a partner. Used when a partner of the LLP is itself an entity rather than a natural person. Parallel-block analog to the per-officer pattern's `<role>_entity_N.name`, but applied to a generic 'filer is one of multiple partners' context (not formation-time roles).

signer_printed_name_and_capacity.description: Printed name and capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of an entity-partner (filing.signer_entity.name). Same primitive as `<role>_entity_N.signer_printed_name_and_capacity` from per-officer-signer-pattern, applied under filing.signer_entity.*.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
